creator: langry@foxland.net.ua
text:
during processing command find of suid files from script  /etc/periodic/security/100.chksetuid some files on partiton which placed on FreeBSD PseudoRAID RAID1 is damaged. damage is a random change 4 bytes in offset 252 from head of damaged file. On partition which placed on non raid devices files not damaged

How-To-Repeat: store checksums of files on partition which placed on FreeBSD PseudoRAID RAID1. then run script /etc/periodic/security/100.chksetuid. then check checksums of files.. on some files checksums not be identical
